Title: File Sorter
Project: file_sorter
Anchor: scratch
- [ ] ensure_dir src | verify: dir_exists src
- [ ] write_file src/main.py | contents: import os, sys
from pathlib import Path

def sort_files(input_dir, output_dir):
    input_path = Path(input_dir)
    output_path = Path(output_dir)
    if not input_path.is_dir():
        print(f"Input directory {input_dir} does not exist.")
        return
    output_path.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    for file in input_path.iterdir():
        if file.is_file():
            ext = file.suffix.lstrip('.') or 'no_extension'
            target_dir = output_path / ext
            target_dir.mkdir(exist_ok=True)
            dest = target_dir / file.name
            file.rename(dest)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    import argparse
    parser=argparse.ArgumentParser()
    parser.add_argument("input", help="Input directory")
    parser.add_argument("output", help="Output directory")
    args=parser.parse_args()
    sort_files(args.input, args.output)
- [ ] write_file README.md | contents: # File Sorter

A simple command‑line tool that moves files from an input

    py -3 src/main.py <input_dir> <output_dir>
